title: ADR-0002 — three parallel pure-utility modules in src/lib (local-seo-agency)
content: Accepted & IMPLEMENTED 2026-05-27: docs/adr/ADR-0002-parallel-pure-utility-modules.md. Added three FILE-DISJOINT pure helpers to src/lib, each with colocated *.test.ts, no cross-imports → parallel-worktree safe (only shared edit = package.json test wiring): (1) slug.ts slugify — lowercase/trim/collapse [^a-z0-9]+ to single hyphen/strip edge hyphens, ASCII-only by design (Café→caf, no diacritic transliteration; flag as new task if SEO ever needs café→cafe); (2) num.ts clamp (inclusive, ±Inf snaps to bound, NaN value→NaN, min>max or NaN bound throws RangeError) + roundTo (exponential re-parse to beat binary FP so 1.005→1.01, non-finite value returned unchanged, neg/NaN decimals→0); (3) str.ts truncate (ellipsis counted against max, result len≤max) + titleCase (first char up/rest down, PRESERVES whitespace runs). Suite 31 pass/0 fail ~259ms Node v24, tsc clean. Reuses ADR-0001 harness (node --test via tsx, extensionless imports). Build on this; do not re-scope.

title: ADR-0002 committed as 39b1d1d on dev-clone/adr-0002-parallel-utils (2026-05-27)
content: TEAM MODE: ADR-0002 (three parallel pure-utility modules in src/lib of local-seo-agency) verified green and committed. SAME workspace-reset pattern as ADR-0001: tree was on main with all ADR-0002 work UNCOMMITTED (num.ts/num.test.ts, slug.ts/slug.test.ts, str.ts/str.test.ts untracked, package.json modified, ADR doc untracked); no prior dev-clone branch existed. NOTE: this run the ADR-0001 files (rank.ts, format.test.ts) were NOT present — workspace had only ADR-0002 work. Re-verified independently: 31/31 tests green (~204ms, Node v24), tsc --noEmit clean. Confirmed all three modules have ZERO imports / no cross-imports (truly file-disjoint, parallel-safe), so I skipped the worktree/merge dance and committed the already-integrated result directly on branch dev-clone/adr-0002-parallel-utils (commit 39b1d1d, 8 paths). slugify is ASCII-only by design. These are pure internal utilities — no UI/external-contract change, no sign-off gate. LESSON: for a multi-task breakdown that's ALREADY implemented file-disjoint and green, worktrees are redundant — verify disjointness (grep cross-imports) and commit the integrated tree.

Code review APPROVE — ADR-0002 (local-seo-agency) parallel utils @ 39b1d1d
content: Reviewed ADR-0002 three pure-utility modules at commit 39b1d1d on branch dev-clone/adr-0002-parallel-utils (workspace-reset pattern: hash matched handoff this time; tree clean). Verdict APPROVE — no security/correctness/critical issues. Verified independently: 31/31 tests green (~215ms), tsc --noEmit exit 0, zero cross-imports, zero external call sites (lone 'truncate' grep hit is a Tailwind class in MapPackCard.tsx, not the fn). Modules: slug.ts (slugify, ASCII-only by design — Café→caf, documented), num.ts (clamp throws RangeError on NaN/inverted bounds + propagates NaN value; roundTo returns non-finite unchanged — notably BETTER finite-safety than ADR-0001's format.ts NaN gaps), str.ts (truncate + titleCase). Two LOW non-gating notes: [cr2-f1] truncate splits on UTF-16 code units (surrogate-pair hazard if wired to live Unicode); [cr2-f2] slugify no diacritic transliteration (product call if SEO needs café→cafe). ADR-0001 findings (cr-f1..f4) are in format.ts/KeywordTable.tsx — NOT in this changeset, not re-flagged. LESSON: num.ts shows the team learned the finite-guard lesson from ADR-0001's format.ts gaps.

RULE APPLIED: never reuse/overwrite tags -> incremented PAST all three burned numbers to 0.2.4 (tag-conflict => increment-patch). Change set since v0.2.0 (commits 8f2a019 + 39b1d1d) = three pure-utility lib modules src/lib/{slug.ts:slugify, num.ts:clamp+roundTo, str.ts:truncate+titleCase} + co-located tests + npm test harness (node --import tsx --test) + tsx devDep + ADR-0001/ADR-0002/backlog/moonshots docs + README refresh => all NON-BREAKING, no user-facing runtime feature => PATCH per repo 0.x convention (breaking->MINOR, else->PATCH). NOTE: strict semver would call new exported lib API a MINOR, but repo convention + no consumers wired keeps it PATCH (consistent with v0.2.2 test-harness call). Burned-tag count now 3 (v0.2.1-v0.2.3); flagged orphaned-tag cleanup for review again. LESSON: this repo resets every run leaving stale tags — ALWAYS git tag --merged HEAD vs git tag, find first free patch above ALL existing tags.
